title: ItemStateTable conversion preview
description: Preview C ItemStateTable definitions generated from assembly data labels.
status_message: Tool-local implementation: APIs import tools/_impl/melee/tools/gen_item_state_table.py logic without writing source.
limitations: Only handles ItemStateTable-shaped asm data blocks with four words per entry.
Preview output needs source ownership, symbol, and section checks before applying.
The API intentionally does not insert generated code into source files.

usage.agent_guidance: Use to preview ItemStateTable conversion; apply source changes only after ownership and section placement are verified.
